description: Warn-only retention floors for the compaction-fidelity eval. NON-BLOCKING: compaction summarization is non-deterministic and LLM-driven, so run.mjs prints a ⚠️ line when a category's verbatim fact-retention falls below its floor but never exits non-zero. 'Retention' is a CONSERVATIVE fidelity floor — a fact paraphrased rather than kept verbatim counts as a miss, so the true fidelity is at least this. Raise floors when the bar genuinely moves; seed `observed` from the first local run.
